page_title: Strategem — Like having a strategy team on every engagement
hero_eyebrow: AI Strategy Platform · Built for practitioners
hero_sub: Strategem brings AI research agents, live engagement tracking, automated slide decks and virtual consultant sessions into one workspace — so your firm delivers better outcomes, without adding headcount.
hero_note: No commitment · Reply within 24 hours · Live in 48 hours
problem_headline: Great strategy shouldn't cost half a million dollars
problem_sub: Traditional consulting is slow, fragmented and priced out of reach for most teams. Strategem puts enterprise-grade strategic intelligence into your workflow — so your team spends time on insight, not preparation.
prob1_body: Competitive analysis, market sizing, risk assessment — analysts spend days on tasks AI agents complete in minutes. That's time stolen from client work.
prob2_body: Consultants spend up to 60% of their time on decks, notes and status updates — not the thinking clients pay for. That ratio needs to flip.
prob3_body: Call transcripts in email, strategy docs in Drive, KPIs in spreadsheets. When context lives in silos, every new engagement starts from scratch.
prob4_title: No live read on portfolio health
prob4_body: Quarterly reviews are already too late. Without a live view across all ventures, risks go unspotted and momentum stalls before anyone notices.
hiw_headline: From brief to delivery, all in one place
step1_body: Add a venture or client in seconds. Upload transcripts, briefs and financials — AI extracts and structures everything automatically into the knowledge base.
step2_body: Deploy AI agents for competitive intel, market sizing or risk assessment. Generate board-ready slide decks. Run virtual AI consultant sessions grounded in your client's own data.
step3_title: Track, check in and stay sharp
step3_body: Live RAG health dashboard across every venture, sprint and stream. Weekly AI-summarised check-ins. Your whole portfolio, visible at a glance.
feat_headline: Everything your strategy practice needs. Nothing it doesn't.
feat_sub: Built for the full consulting lifecycle — from first client brief through portfolio-level reporting. No separate tools, no manual handoffs.
usecases_headline: The right fit for your operating model
usecases_sub: Strategem adapts to how you work — whether you run a 200-venture portfolio, a boutique firm, or are flying solo.
agents_headline: 30+ agents. One for every strategic scenario.
agents_sub: Purpose-built for consulting work — not generic chat. Each agent knows the methodology, the output format and the standard a senior partner would hold it to.
stats_sub: One McKinsey engagement runs $150k–$500k. Strategem delivers the same research infrastructure, knowledge management and strategic support — for a monthly subscription that pays for itself in week one.
t3_role: Head of Strategy, Mid-market PE Fund
pricing_sub: All plans include the core platform, AI Workbench and meeting assistant. Upgrade for more AI credits, agents and consultant capacity.
price3_annual: Priced on ventures, users and custom requirements
cta_headline: Your next engagement deserves a strategy team
cta_body: Strategem gives advisory firms, corporate strategy teams and independent consultants the AI infrastructure to deliver sharper work, faster — without expanding the payroll.
cta_note: No commitment · Reply within 24 hours · Live in 48 hours
footer_tagline: AI-powered strategy platform for advisory firms, consulting practices, corporate strategy teams and independent consultants.
